rationale: Section 25.06 governs how encumbered property is listed for taxation; it is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: Except as provided by Section 25.07, property encumbered by a leasehold or other possessory interest or by a mortgage, deed of trust, or other interest securing payment or performance of an obligation shall be listed in the name of the owner of the property so encumbered.
_note: Rule text concerns property listing/encumbrance procedures, not homestead exemption amounts; no intersection with proposed change.
